subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Render thanks unto God that thou art joined in marriage with one who believeth in God and art an intimate companion to a soul who is detached from all save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن خدا را که قرینه مومن بالله هستی و همراز با نفسی از دون حق
